summary: Planned a guarded repair artifact for editable contributor PR #94000. No close, comment, label, merge, force-push, or bypass action is proposed; #93928 remains open until #94000 is repaired and validated, and closed linked issue #37626 is historical context only.

actions.reason: Closed linked issue is historical evidence only and is not part of the active drive repair mutation path.
The issue is covered by the #94000 repair path, but fixed-by-candidate closeout is not allowed before a validated fix lands.
A repair artifact is the executable safe path for the editable canonical contributor PR; validation and review must be completed by the executor before any later merge or closeout workflow.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair editable contributor PR #94000 for the narrow Feishu drive pagination path. Keep the work focused on extensions/feishu/src/drive.ts unless the target checkout proves a schema type change is the minimal required fix; correct any remaining settled SDK type handling and lint/brace failures without broadening the Feishu drive surface.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
Repair the Feishu drive pagination implementation from source PR #94000 without broadening the surface beyond the drive list/info pagination bug from #93928.

## Scope
- Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94000
- Issue: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/93928
- Contributor credit: Thanks @ajwan8998 for the source PR and implementation direction.

## Validation
- pnpm check:changed
- /review

## Notes
Do not edit extensions/feishu/src/drive-schema.ts unless the current target checkout proves that a schema type change is the minimal corrective surface. Keep #37626 as historical Feishu pagination context only; it is already closed from a wiki-surface fix on main.
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for @ajwan8998 from #94000.
If a replacement PR is required, name #94000 as the source PR and carry contributor attribution in the PR body.
